hero.tagline: Segment-leading luxury, tech and safety in a compact SUV.

overview.minides: Bold design, premium tech, and everyday comfort — the Seltos delivers big-SUV vibes in a city-friendly package.
overview.description: The all-new Kia Seltos (2026) is a second-generation compact SUV available in 40 variants across 9 trims. It offers a Trinity Panoramic Display (dual 12.3-inch screens in one panel), Level-2+ ADAS with 16 safety features, dual-pane panoramic sunroof, 10-way powered driver seat, 8-speaker Bose sound system with Personal Space, 360-degree camera, Blind View Monitor, and Kia Connect 2.0. Three engine options: 1.5L NA Petrol (115 bhp), 1.5L Turbo Petrol (160 bhp), and 1.5L Diesel (116 bhp). 5-star BNCAP rated.

brakes.note: All-wheel disc brakes – standard across all 40 variants
